fixture.purpose: Complete symbol and relationship ground truth for TypeScript core extraction, alias resolution, barrels, overload collapsing, DI-style interface dispatch, recursion, unresolved dynamic calls, tests, ADR links, and one boundary violation.
nastyCases: Three overload declarations collapse to one format node
DI-style Runner dependency resolves to Strategy.run only
Computed handlers[key]() call produces an unresolved synthetic target
Static tests and a misleading test file with no linkage
ADR exact path, unique symbol links, ambiguous symbol, and missing path

analyzerContract.recursiveRenameStageB: A recursive function renamed in a later snapshot is expected to fall back to raw added/removed diff because the self-reference changes its body hash.

notes: A later rename changes its self-reference text and is not Stage-B coalesced.
Three overload declarations collapse to one logical function node.
Synthetic unresolved call target for computed property dispatch.
